description: NoSQL injection — Mongoose / MongoDB driver raw operators ($where, JSON.parse(input)) and unsafe aggregations

patterns.label: MongoDB $where with concatenation/function/template — server-side JS execution, injection
find(JSON.parse(req.*)) — operator injection via raw user JSON
MongoDB aggregate() pipeline using $where — server-side JS execution
new RegExp from req.* — ReDoS and NoSQL query-shape injection
find/findOne with untyped req.* value — coerce to string or operator injection (e.g. { $ne: null })
